subject: chore(types): align debugLog window-augmentation with other HMR files
body:
debugLog.ts was the only HMR-guarded module still using
`(window as any).__debugXxx` casts. The other HMR-safe files
(useDialogA11y, usePWAInstall, usePWAUpdate, useDarkMode) all
use `declare global { interface Window { ... } }` instead.

Added a declare-global block for the three flags
(__debugConsolePatched, __debugLogListenersAttached, __debugLogReady),
removed the 6 `as any` casts. `__debugLogReady` is also read by the
pre-framework inline pill in index.html; documented that in the
declare-global comment.

Also trimmed the HMR dispose docblock (7 lines → 4) — the
Requirement/Approach/Alternatives format was over-heavy for the
narrow point ("without this, orphaned old-module debugLog receives
events").

The `(navigator as any).standalone` cast at line 133 is pre-existing
(iOS Safari's non-standard property) and out of scope.

Zero runtime effect — purely type-consistency.

Type-check clean. 145/145 tests pass.

Tags: types, debug, hmr, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: patch
title: align debugLog window-augmentation with other HMR files
